name: property managers handling 5–15 tenant leases/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 tenant leases/month, inconsistent compliance tracking causes potential legal issues and penalties. We automate compliance summaries instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent compliance tracking leads to potential legal issues and penalties.
